queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: no known savings account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the relationship between the absence of a known savings account and reduced credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Statistical impact of savings account balances below 100 DM on the mitigation of credit risk and default likelihood.

queries.feature_definition: Loan purpose: purchase of a used car.
queries.question: Determinants of credit risk associated with the loan purpose of purchasing a used car and their influence on default reduction.
